raw_response: Given your price sensitivity and budget constraints, the Voltix 65W charger is a cost-effective choice. It offers good wattage with GaN technology and PPS support for efficient charging. The included cable adds convenience, though its plasticky build and tendency to run hot are drawbacks. While it's from a lesser-known brand, the price point makes it worthwhile if you prioritize budget over brand familiarity or warranty support.
